title: mutisia mandoniana
intro: Mutisia mandoniana, also known as the Velvet Flower or Mandon's Mutisia, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The medicinal properties of Mutisia mandoniana include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Mutisia mandoniana typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
